basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune – Project Research Scientist – 01 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research (IISER) Pune
basic_details.short_information: IISER Pune Project Research Scientist-II Recruitment 2026 is now open for 1 vacancy of Project Research Scientist-II for candidates possessing a Ph.D with applications accepted through Walk-in Interview on 09-06-2026 at IISER Pune. Candidates can check the official notification and recruitment details through the official website iiserpune.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Organic Chemistry or related areas with minimum 3 years of Post-Doctoral experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates must appear for the Walk-in Interview on 09 June 2026 at the given venue. Download the application form from the official IISER Pune website and fill it carefully. Bring all required documents as mentioned above.
seo_tags: IISER Pune Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 – Walk in
